headline: 3-Year Retroactive FICA Tax Claims Preparation Checklist — Sacramento
articleBody:
3-Year Retroactive FICA Tax Claims Preparation Checklist for Sacramento Clients

Before your 3-Year Retroactive FICA Tax Claims appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
